headline: Technology executive and AI advocate
summary: Leon has worked in technology leadership, developer advocacy, cloud computing, databases, and artificial intelligence. He is known for explaining technical ideas clearly and helping professionals understand emerging technologies.

experiences.title: Technology Executive
experiences.description: Worked on cloud, data, AI, and developer-focused technology programs.

experiences.title: Developer Advocate
experiences.description: Helped developers learn and adopt IBM technologies through education, demos, and technical content.

fun_facts: He has worked across both technical and business sides of technology.
He is associated with explaining complex topics in a practical way.
His background makes him a good example for an AI networking icebreaker demo.
